title: AURA — Add static generated images for all seeded search result items

requirements.summary: Add missing generated product photos as static frontend assets so seeded search results display item-relevant images instead of the hanger fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: Each backend-seeded `/assets/generated/<filename>` resolves to an existing file under `frontend/public/assets/generated/<filename>`.
Visiting the Results page for searches that return seeded items displays item photos (not the hanger fallback) for all results whose `photo` paths exist.

file_operations.description: Add the generated static product image asset at `frontend/public/assets/generated/men_casual_shirt_blue_solid.dim_480x640.jpeg` (men’s blue solid casual shirt) so `/assets/generated/men_casual_shirt_blue_solid.dim_480x640.jpeg` loads successfully.

Add the generated static product image asset at `frontend/public/assets/generated/mens_red_floral_shirt_mens_shirt_red_floral.dim_480x640.jpeg` (men’s red floral shirt) so `/assets/generated/mens_red_floral_shirt_mens_shirt_red_floral.dim_480x640.jpeg` loads successfully.
